title: Weak signal — first thing
steps: Move away from cabinet, TV and metal.
warnings: The app does not change settings automatically.
dontDo: do not hide router in cabinet

title: Weak signal — full plan
summary: Improve range through placement and test map.
steps: Avoid cabinets, floor, metal and TV.
warnings: Do not reset router without saved data.
dontDo: do not buy repeater before testing

title: Slow speed
dontDo: do not judge connection from one place

title: Slow speed — checklist
summary: Separate provider, WiFi and load problems.
steps: If close is good, improve range.
warnings: The app does not log into router.
dontDo: do not change many settings at once

title: Disconnects — first test
summary: Check if one device or whole network drops.
dontDo: do not reset without provider details

title: Disconnects — stability plan
summary: Find device, range, load or router cause.
steps: If whole network drops, check provider or service.
dontDo: do not change channels and security together

title: Problem in one room
summary: Usually walls, distance or router position.
steps: Test near router and in room.
dontDo: do not buy extender without test

title: One room — plan
summary: Test map and decision: router, mesh or access point.
steps: Test near router, halfway and in room.
Use access point if Ethernet exists.
warnings: Repeater in dead zone repeats weak signal.
dontDo: do not place repeater where signal is gone

title: Many devices
steps: Check if all devices are affected.
dontDo: do not assume range is the only issue

title: Many devices — checklist
steps: Put close fast devices on 5 GHz.
Consider newer router or mesh if router is old.
Test one change at a time.
warnings: The app does not switch bands automatically.
dontDo: do not rename networks without plan

title: Router in bad place
summary: Cabinet, floor or TV can hurt WiFi.

title: Bad router place — plan
steps: Move from metal, aquarium and microwave.
If improvement is small, consider mesh.
dontDo: do not hide in closed cabinet

title: Many walls — mesh
summary: One router may not be enough.
dontDo: do not expect full speed behind many walls

title: Many walls — plan
summary: When mesh, repeater or access point makes sense.
steps: Test near router, halfway and problem area.
Mesh helps if halfway signal is good.
Access point is better with cable.
Place repeater where signal is good.
In multi-floor home consider node per floor.
warnings: Mesh does not fix slow provider connection.
dontDo: do not buy extender without halfway test

title: Basic WiFi diagnosis
warnings: The app does not change settings automatically.
dontDo: do not change settings without notes

title: Universal WiFi plan
summary: Safe order to improve home WiFi.
steps: Choose 5 GHz or 2.4 GHz by distance.
With wall problem consider mesh or access point.
dontDo: do not reset router without data
